healthReason: P0: Worker pool dead on jared box — queue depth 61 and growing, all agents frozen. Human must run server/deploy.sh. QA swarm non-operational (4+ days). P1 circuit breakers and Copilot event pipeline ongoing.
summary: Late-evening cycle 2026-03-29. P0 escalated: worker pool dead (queue 61, all 32 PIDs dead — flagged #1402, human action required). Fixed cron collision #1372 (shellforge-research-scout 2→5 8,20, closed). Merged PR #1400 (bootstrap worktree fix), PR #1406 (marketing EM cycle). Commented on conflicting PR #1396 (kernel EM, needs rebase). P1 blockers #1335/#1342 still open (circuit breakers auto-resolve 2026-04-01, Copilot events unresolved). New dogfood #1408 filed (no-governance-self-modification blocks read-only SQLite probe — second occurrence, needs fix). QA swarm non-operational 4+ days (#1403). Invariant coverage at 50% vs 75% target (#1407). Site stats clean. CI green. Version drift persists (cloud 2.10.1, analytics 2.10.2 vs 2.10.3).

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: no-governance-self-modification blocks read-only SQLite probe of agentguard.db
dogfoodPatterns.description: analytics-invariant-researcher cannot query agentguard.db for governance event analysis. Invariant is path-based — any command referencing .agentguard/ is blocked regardless of read vs write. Third attempt would trigger LOCKDOWN. Second occurrence of this class (first was #1027). Creates catch-22: analytics agents tasked with analyzing violations cannot query the violation database.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Introduce read-only governance DB access exemption — either a governance.read action type or read-only condition modifier in no-governance-self-modification. See #1408 for suggested YAML.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: docker stop/rm blocked for named ephemeral test containers
dogfoodPatterns.description: Destructive command guard blocks docker stop/rm on named ephemeral test containers. No distinction between production and test containers. QA smoke runner workaround: npm run db:test:down (routes via Node.js).
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add policy allowlist for known test container name patterns or expose a test-scope context. Two occurrences now documented.

dogfoodPatterns.resolvedBy: PR #1400 merged 2026-03-29T22:00Z — wrapper probes binary, falls back to main worktree binary.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [P0] Worker pool dead — queue depth 61 (growing), all 32 PIDs dead
crossCuttingIssues.description: All scheduled agents on jared box are frozen. Queue depth 61 items (was 46 when filed ~2h ago). Workers killed by box restart or SIGKILL. Human must run server/deploy.sh to flush stale queue, stop lingering processes, and start fresh pool.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [qa-conductor] readybench QA swarm non-operational — bench-devs-platform not found
crossCuttingIssues.description: All 19 readybench QA agents have been skipping for 4+ days. Wrong queue routing: agents have box:readybench in schedule.json but appear in jared's queue. bench-devs-platform not at expected path on jared host. readybench worker may not be consuming its own queue.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Ops: fix box routing for readybench agents, verify readybench worker is running

crossCuttingIssues.title: [studio-qa] Codex + Copilot circuit breakers OPEN — 52% swarm blocked
crossCuttingIssues.description: March budget exhaustion — Codex + Copilot quotas exhausted. 68/132 agents blocked. Auto-resolves 2026-04-01 at budget reset. No action needed unless demo requires Copilot/Codex agents before April 1.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Wait for budget reset 2026-04-01. Conference demo using Claude Code (unaffected).

crossCuttingIssues.title: [studio-qa] Copilot event pipeline producing 0 events — conference demo gap
crossCuttingIssues.description: Copilot hook adapter not emitting events. 364K+ total events, none tagged copilot. Conference demo (May 6) requires proof of multi-driver governance. No update in >24h.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Studio squad: investigate Copilot hook adapter, confirm agents running post-CB-recovery

crossCuttingIssues.title: Invariant Coverage Report — 50% coverage (below 75% target)
crossCuttingIssues.description: 12 of 24 invariants have never fired in 5.5 days of 106-agent operation. Violation rate 9.1% (above 2% target). Dormant: no-secret-exposure, blast-radius-limit, no-package-script-injection, large-file-write, lockfile-integrity, no-container-config-modification, no-destructive-migration, transitive-effect-analysis, no-network-egress, no-ide-socket-access, commit-scope-guard, no-verify-bypass.
crossCuttingIssues.action: kernel squad: review dormant invariants — are they misconfigured, too narrow, or genuinely not applicable to current workloads?

crossCuttingIssues.title: Version drift: cloud 2.10.1, analytics 2.10.2 vs kernel 2.10.3
crossCuttingIssues.action: Cloud squad: upgrade agentguard-cloud and agentguard-analytics to 2.10.3

crossCuttingIssues.description: shellforge-research-scout offset from minute 2 to minute 5 (schedule.json). 4-min gap before ollama-integration completes. GPU contention resolved.
